methodology: Outcome-based OKRs connected to customer jobs, product capabilities, product bricks, teams, and planning artifacts.
description: Next horizon objectives for enterprise migration, regional trust, marketplace expansion, and AI platform maturity.
okrDesignPrinciples: Use measurable customer and business outcomes instead of feature-completion language.
Avoid single-child KPI trees and keep leading indicators visible.
Tie objectives to customer jobs, product capabilities, product bricks, and owning teams.
Separate current, next, KTLO, and archived work so planning intent remains clear.

companyObjectives.name: Grow trusted public-cloud adoption
companyObjectives.description: Grow durable cloud consumption by helping customers build, run, secure, and scale workloads.

companyObjectives.name: Improve cloud operating quality
companyObjectives.description: Reduce the reliability, security, cost, and governance risks that limit cloud expansion.

objectives.name: Scale enterprise migration throughput
objectives.description: Improve migration assessment, dependency mapping, landing-zone readiness, and cutover automation for priority enterprise portfolios.

objectives.name: Increase marketplace and partner attach
objectives.description: Convert enterprise accounts into cloud ecosystem accounts through private offers, partner solutions, entitlement, and support workflows.

objectives.name: Strengthen regulated and sovereign workload readiness
objectives.description: Improve encryption, identity, residency, audit, and resilience readiness for regulated workloads.
